name: Bourbon Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Pecans or walnuts, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Mix the crushed wafers, powdered sugar, pecans, and cocoa. Stir in bourbon and corn syrup. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls. Roll each ball in granulated sugar. Refrigerate in a tightly covered container for several days before serving.
Substitutions:
- Brandy Balls: Substitute 1/2 cup brandy for the bourbon.
- Rum Balls: Substitute 1/2 cup light rum for the bourbon.
